title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Contact Course Tab – New Lesson Allocation Button – Displayed for HQ/CM user

- Navigate to Student detail → Contact → Course tab
- Student has at least one course with require_allocation = TRUE

2. "Click on Contact tab"
3. "Click on Course sub-tab"
4. "Scroll to the Require Lesson Allocation table"

2. "Contact tab opens"
3. "Course tab content is shown"
4. ""New Lesson Allocation" button is visible below the table"

- Student has 1 active enrolled location (Location A)
- Course "Math" exists for AY 2026 + Location A

7. "Enter Start date = 2026-04-01"
8. "Enter End date = 2026-09-30"
9. "Click Save / Confirm"
10. "Navigate to Student → Contact → Course tab"
11. "Open the new LA record"

6. "Purchased Slot shows 10"
7. "Start date = 2026-04-01"
8. "End date = 2026-09-30; no error shown"
9. "User is redirected to Contact page"
10. "New LA row for Math / AY 2026 / Location A is visible in the Require Lesson Allocation table"
11. "Product details, student course id, package course, order remarks are all empty / no value"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Calendar – Student List – UI-created LA always visible (Ignore Duration)
description: System integration — Verify that a student with an LA created via the UI always appears on the Student List in the Calendar environment, regardless of the LA duration, because Calendar does not check LA duration limits when filtering students.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user
- A UI-created LA exists for Student A: Course X, Type = Regular, Start 2026-01-01, End 2026-01-15, `require_allocation = TRUE`
- A published group lesson exists for Course X on a date far outside the LA duration (e.g., 2026-05-01)
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to Calendar tab"
2. "Select the lesson for Course X on 2026-05-01"
3. "Open the ""Add Students"" or view the Student List assigning to the lesson"
4. "Search for Student A in the list"
steps_result:
1. "Calendar is displayed"
2. "Lesson details/drawer opens"
3. "Student list opens allowing searching by Course X"
4. "Student A still appears successfully in the Student List and is enabled to assign"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Calendar – Lesson Assignment – Update LA Date does not auto assign/unassign
description: Integration — Verify that extending or modifying an LA’s date on the UI does not trigger any implicit/background processes to auto-assign or auto-unassign the student from their existing lesson events on the Calendar.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user
- Student A has a UI-created LA for Course X: Start 2026-04-01, End 2026-06-30
- Student A has been manually assigned to Lesson L1 (Course X) on 2026-05-15 (within LA range)
- Student A is also assigned to another Lesson L2 (Course X) on 2026-08-01 (outside original LA range, which is allowed by Calendar rules)
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to Contact → Course tab → Edit LA from the UI"
2. "Extend End Date from 2026-06-30 to 2026-12-31 and save"
3. "Navigate to Calendar tab"
4. "Check the participation of Student A in Lesson L1 (2026-05-15)"
5. "Check the participation of Student A in Lesson L2 (2026-08-01)"
steps_result:
1. "LA modal opens with editable Start and End Date fields"
2. "LA saved successfully"
3. "Calendar view opens"
4. "Student A is still assigned to Lesson L1; no background unassign triggered"
5. "Student A is still assigned to Lesson L2; no auto-status updates or removals triggered"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Calendar – Delete LA – Synchronous unlinking
description: Integration — Verify that deleting a UI-created LA synchronously removes the student from any calendar lessons they were already assigned to. According to Business Rule 32, the lesson unlinking is immediate.
preconditions:
- Logged in as HQ or CM user
- Student A has a UI-created LA for Course X
- Student A is assigned to two upcoming published group lessons (L1 and L2) for Course X
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to Calendar and verify Student A in L1 and L2"
2. "Navigate to Contact → Course tab → Delete the LA for Student A"
3. "Confirm the deletion"
4. "Navigate back to Calendar and check Student Sessions for L1 and L2"
steps_result:
1. "Student A is visible in the Student Sessions list for both L1 and L2"
2. "Confirmation dialog warns about allocated lessons being removed"
3. "LA is immediately deleted"
4. "Student A no longer appears in the sessions for either L1 or L2; synchronous unlinking happened successfully"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Calendar – Student Dots – "Trial Student" label visibility

steps_result:

2. "Student list for the specific lesson opens"
3. "System correctly displays the ""Trial Student dot"" indicating they are taking a trial"

title: [Riso] Lesson Allocation – Calendar – Assign Student – Recurring lesson – 'Only this' option
